ddls:
CREATE TABLE "students" (
  "student_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each student */,
  "roll_number" TEXT /* Roll number of the student */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the student */,
  "email_id" TEXT /* Email ID of the student */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the student */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the student */,
  "year_of_study" TEXT /* Year of study of the student */,
  "gd_time_slot_id" INTEGER /* Time slot ID assigned to the student for GD */,
  "attendance_status" INTEGER /* Attendance status of the student for the GD */,
  "gd_performance" TEXT /* Performance score or feedback for the student's GD */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the student record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the student record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "time_slots" (
  "time_slot_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each time slot */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the time slot */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the time slot */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the time slot */,
  "max_students" INTEGER /* Maximum number of students that can be assigned to the time slot */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the time slot was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the time slot */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("time_slot_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "gd_sessions" (
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each GD session */,
  "time_slot_id" INTEGER /* Time slot ID linking to the `time_slots` table */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the GD session */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the GD session was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the GD session */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("session_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "attendance" (
  "attendance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each attendance record */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* Student ID linking to the `students` table */,
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Session ID linking to the `gd_sessions` table */,
  "attended" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating whether the student attended the GD */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the attendance record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the attendance record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("attendance_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* Student ID linking to the `students` table */,
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Session ID linking to the `gd_sessions` table */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of notification (e.g., 'scheduled', 'reminder') */,
  "sent_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the notification was sent */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the notification (e.g., 'sent', 'failed') */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id")
)
